251.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade the use of the gourd vessel and the pitch-coated vessel for making intoxicating drinks. However, Shu'bah said in the hadith of Mansur: 'I asked about the clay jar and the green jar,' and he replied: 'I will not add anything to what I heard.'
251.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melarang penggunaan labu dan wadah berlapis ter untuk membuat minuman memabukkan. Namun Syu'bah berkata dalam hadis Manshur: 'Aku bertanya tentang tempayan tanah liat dan tempayan hijau,' dan ia menjawab: 'Aku tidak akan menambahkan apa pun dari apa yang aku dengar.'

252.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'You bring your disputes to me, and perhaps some of you are more eloquent in presenting their case than others. I judge based on what I hear. So whoever I judge in his favor with something that rightfully belongs to his brother — it is only a piece of Fire I am cutting for him, so let him not take it.'
252.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Kalian membawa perselisihan kalian kepadaku, dan mungkin sebagian dari kalian lebih fasih dalam menyampaikan argumennya daripada yang lain. Aku memutuskan berdasarkan apa yang aku dengar. Maka barang siapa yang aku putuskan sesuatu untuknya yang sebenarnya milik saudaranya — itu hanyalah sepotong api yang aku potongkan untuknya, maka janganlah ia mengambilnya.'

253.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ loved consistent deeds. She was asked: 'At what time of night did he stand for prayer?' She replied: 'When he heard the rooster crow.'
253.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ menyukai amalan yang dilakukan secara terus-menerus. Ia ditanya: 'Pada waktu malam apa beliau berdiri untuk shalat?' Ia menjawab: 'Ketika beliau mendengar kokok ayam jantan.'

254.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Seek the consent of women regarding their persons in marriage.' It was asked: 'But a virgin girl feels shy and stays silent.' He said: 'Her silence is her permission.'
254.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Mintalah persetujuan para wanita mengenai diri mereka dalam pernikahan.' Ditanyakan: 'Tetapi seorang gadis perawan merasa malu dan diam saja.' Beliau bersabda: 'Diamnya adalah izinnya.'

255.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that Abu Bakr and his father Abd al-Rahman went to Marwan and informed him about the matter of a man who had a wet dream and then fasted. Marwan said: 'I order both of you to go to Abu Hurayra and tell him.' They went to Abu Hurayra and told him. He said: 'They both told you. I was only informed of it by al-Fadl ibn Abbas.'
255.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Abu Bakar dan ayahnya Abd al-Rahman pergi menemui Marwan dan memberitahunya tentang seorang laki-laki yang bermimpi basah lalu berpuasa. Marwan berkata: 'Aku perintahkan kalian berdua untuk pergi kepada Abu Hurairah dan memberitahunya.' Mereka pergi menemui Abu Hurairah dan memberitahunya. Ia berkata: 'Mereka berdua yang mengatakannya kepada kalian. Aku hanya diberitahu tentang itu oleh al-Fadhl bin Abbas.'

256.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would become ritually impure during the night while intending to fast. He would take a bath after dawn broke, and then complete his fast.'
256.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ terkadang dalam keadaan junub di malam hari sementara beliau berniat berpuasa. Beliau mandi setelah fajar terbit, lalu menyempurnakan puasanya.'

257.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked about Abu Hurayra's ruling that whoever wakes up in a state of ritual impurity has no fast. She replied: 'I do not say anything about that. The caller to prayer would call, and I would see him pour water over himself between his shoulders, then he would pray Fajr and remain fasting for the day.'
257.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya tentang fatwa Abu Hurairah bahwa siapa yang bangun dalam keadaan junub maka tidak ada puasa baginya. Ia menjawab: 'Aku tidak mengatakan apa pun tentang itu. Muadzin memanggil untuk shalat, dan aku melihatnya menuangkan air di antara bahunya, lalu ia shalat Subuh dan tetap berpuasa sepanjang hari.'

258.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), from the Prophet ﷺ, that he said: 'No thorn or anything greater that strikes a believer, but it serves as an expiation for him.'
258.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), dari Nabi ﷺ, bahwa beliau bersabda: 'Tidaklah duri atau sesuatu yang lebih besar yang menimpa seorang mukmin, melainkan itu menjadi penebus baginya.'

259.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ, when he rose for the night prayer, would pray two brief rak'ahs to begin.
259.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ, ketika bangun untuk shalat malam, biasa memulai dengan dua rakaat ringan.

260.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ named five creatures as harmful and said they may be killed in both the sanctified zone and outside it: the kite, the crow with a white streak, the kite, and the biting dog.
260.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ menyebutkan lima jenis makhluk berbahaya dan bersabda bahwa mereka boleh dibunuh baik di dalam maupun di luar tanah haram: elang, gagak berbintik putih, elang, dan anjing yang menggigit.

261.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was shrouded in three white Yemeni garments of cotton. She said: 'There was no shirt nor turban in his shroud.'
261.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ dikafani dalam tiga kain putih dari Yaman yang terbuat dari kapas. Ia berkata: 'Tidak ada kemeja maupun surban dalam kafannya.'

262.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked by a woman who had an extended irregular bleeding: 'Should I abandon the prayer?' She said: 'No. Avoid prayer during your menstrual days, then perform a full bath and make ablution before each prayer, then pray even if blood drips onto the mat.'
262.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang wanita yang mengalami pendarahan tidak teratur yang berkepanjangan bertanya kepadanya: 'Apakah aku harus meninggalkan shalat?' Ia berkata: 'Tidak. Tinggalkanlah shalat selama hari-hari haidmu, lalu mandi besar dan berwudhu sebelum setiap shalat, kemudian shalatlah meskipun darah menetes ke tikar.'

263.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Prophet ﷺ would bring his head close to me while he was in i'tikaf in the mosque, and I would wash and comb it for him — and I was menstruating.'
263.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Nabi ﷺ mendekatkan kepalanya kepadaku sementara beliau sedang beri'tikaf di masjid, dan aku mencuci serta menyisir rambutnya untuknya — sedangkan aku sedang haid.'

264.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would place his head in my lap while I was menstruating, and recite the Quran.'
264.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa meletakkan kepalanya di pangkuanku sementara aku sedang haid, dan membaca Al-Qur'an.'

265.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would engage in intimate contact with me while I was menstruating — and he had the greatest control over his desires of all of you.'
265.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa bercumbu denganku sementara aku sedang haid — dan beliau adalah orang yang paling mampu menahan syahwatnya di antara kalian.'

266.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray Asr while the sun was still shining in my chamber.'
266.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat Ashar sementara matahari masih menyinari kamarku.'

267.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray at night while I was beside him — and I was menstruating — wearing a shawl, with part of it over him.'
267.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat di malam hari sementara aku berada di sisinya — dan aku sedang haid — mengenakan selimut, sebagian darinya menutupi beliau.'

268.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to combine multiple surahs in a single rak'ah — she said: from al-Mufassal.
268.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa menggabungkan beberapa surah dalam satu rakaat — ia berkata: dari al-Mufashshal.

269.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray both standing and sitting. When he began the prayer standing, he would bow standing; and when he began it sitting, he would bow sitting.'
269.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat baik berdiri maupun duduk. Ketika beliau memulai shalat sambil berdiri, beliau ruku dalam keadaan berdiri; dan ketika beliau memulainya sambil duduk, beliau ruku dalam keadaan duduk.'

270.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray sitting in his later years. When thirty or forty verses remained of the surah he was reciting, he would stand and recite them, then bow.'
270.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat dengan duduk di masa tuanya. Ketika tersisa tiga puluh atau empat puluh ayat dari surah yang sedang dibacanya, beliau berdiri dan membacanya, kemudian ruku.'

271.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Seek Laylat al-Qadr in the last ten nights of Ramadan.'
271.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Carilah Lailatul Qadar pada sepuluh malam terakhir Ramadan.'

272.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked whether the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray the Duha prayer. She replied: 'No, except when he returned from a journey.'
272.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya apakah Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat Dhuha. Ia menjawab: 'Tidak, kecuali ketika beliau kembali dari perjalanan.'

273.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Prophet ﷺ used to make the two rak'ahs of Fajr brief.'
273.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Nabi ﷺ biasa meringankan dua rakaat Subuh.'

274.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ performed Witr at every part of the night — at its beginning, its middle, and its end. His Witr eventually settled at the time of Suhur, and he died while performing Witr at Suhur.'
274.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ melakukan Witr di setiap bagian malam — di awalnya, di tengahnya, dan di akhirnya. Witr beliau akhirnya menetap pada waktu sahur, dan beliau wafat sementara melakukan Witr pada waktu sahur.'

275.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ performed Witr at every part of the night — at its beginning, its middle, and its end — and his Witr eventually settled at the time of Suhur.'
275.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ melakukan Witr di setiap bagian malam — di awalnya, di tengahnya, dan di akhirnya — dan Witr beliau akhirnya menetap pada waktu sahur.'

276.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray at night while I lay stretched out between him and the qiblah. When he wanted to perform Witr, he would wake me, and I would then pray Witr.'
276.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat di malam hari sementara aku berbaring melintang di antara beliau dan kiblat. Ketika beliau ingin melakukan Witr, beliau membangunkanku, lalu aku pun shalat Witr.'

277.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Prophet ﷺ woke me and said: Rise and perform Witr.'
277.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Nabi ﷺ membangunkanku dan bersabda: Bangun dan lakukan Witr.'

278.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I would not encounter the Prophet ﷺ at the end of the night except that he was asleep beside me.'
278.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku tidak pernah menjumpai Nabi ﷺ di akhir malam kecuali beliau sedang tidur di sisiku.'

279.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'If one of you becomes drowsy during his prayer, let him sleep. He may intend to seek forgiveness but end up cursing himself instead.'
279.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jika salah seorang dari kalian mengantuk dalam shalatnya, hendaklah ia tidur. Bisa jadi ia bermaksud memohon ampun namun justru mencela dirinya sendiri.'

280.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that al-Ashtar came to her and she asked: 'Are you the one who wanted to kill my nephew?' He said: 'I wanted to kill him and he wanted to kill me.' She said: 'Had you killed him, you would never have prospered.' She then said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: "The blood of a Muslim is not lawful except in one of three cases: a man who kills and is killed in retaliation; a man who commits adultery after being married; or a man who apostatizes after embracing Islam."'
280.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa al-Asytar datang kepadanya dan ia bertanya: 'Apakah engkau yang ingin membunuh keponakanku?' Ia berkata: 'Aku ingin membunuhnya dan ia ingin membunuhku.' Ia berkata: 'Seandainya engkau membunuhnya, engkau tidak akan pernah beruntung.' Lalu ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Darah seorang Muslim tidak halal kecuali dalam salah satu dari tiga hal: seorang laki-laki yang membunuh lalu dibunuh sebagai balasan; seorang laki-laki yang berzina setelah menikah; atau seorang laki-laki yang murtad setelah memeluk Islam."'

281.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I used to hear that a prophet does not die except that he is given a choice between this world and the Hereafter.' She said: 'He developed hoarseness in his illness in which he died. I heard him reciting: "Among those upon whom Allah has bestowed favor — of the prophets, the steadfast affirmers of truth, the martyrs, and the righteous" (4:69). So I thought he had been given the choice.'
281.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku pernah mendengar bahwa seorang nabi tidak meninggal kecuali diberi pilihan antara dunia dan akhirat.' Ia berkata: 'Beliau mengalami serak dalam sakitnya yang menyebabkan wafatnya. Aku mendengar beliau membaca: "Bersama orang-orang yang dianugerahi nikmat oleh Allah — dari para nabi, para shiddiqin, para syuhada, dan orang-orang saleh" (4:69). Maka aku mengira beliau telah diberi pilihan.'

282.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to perform Witr with five rak'ahs, not sitting except at the very end.
282.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa melakukan Witr dengan lima rakaat, tidak duduk kecuali di akhirnya saja.

283.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave us a choice, and we chose him — so was that a divorce?'
283.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ memberi kami pilihan, dan kami memilih beliau — apakah itu dianggap talak?'

284.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The most hated of men to Allah, the Mighty and Majestic, is the one who is harshly contentious in argumentation.'
284.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Orang yang paling dibenci Allah Yang Maha Mulia lagi Maha Agung adalah orang yang sangat keras kepala dalam berdebat.'

285.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she asked about the verse: 'Those who give what they give while their hearts are fearful' (23:60) — is it about the one who commits adultery, steals, and drinks wine? He said: 'No, O daughter of Abu Bakr — or O daughter of al-Siddiq. Rather it is the man who fasts, prays, and gives charity, yet fears that it will not be accepted from him.'
285.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia bertanya tentang ayat: 'Orang-orang yang memberikan apa yang mereka berikan sementara hati mereka merasa takut' (23:60) — apakah itu tentang orang yang berzina, mencuri, dan minum khamr? Beliau bersabda: 'Tidak, wahai putri Abu Bakar — atau wahai putri al-Shiddiq. Melainkan ia adalah orang yang berpuasa, shalat, dan bersedekah, namun takut bahwa amalnya tidak diterima darinya.'

286.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'A woman mentioned to me the punishment of the grave, and I disbelieved her. Then the Messenger of Allah ﷺ entered and I asked him. He said: "She spoke the truth. By the One in whose hand is my soul, they are truly being punished in their graves, to the extent that even animals can hear their cries."'
286.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Seorang wanita menyebutkan kepadaku tentang azab kubur, dan aku tidak mempercayainya. Kemudian Rasulullah ﷺ masuk dan aku bertanya kepada beliau. Beliau bersabda: "Ia berkata benar. Demi Dzat yang jiwaku ada di tangan-Nya, sesungguhnya mereka benar-benar diazab di kubur mereka, sampai-sampai binatang pun dapat mendengar jeritan mereka."'

287.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'O Messenger of Allah, does Allah not say: "He will be given an easy account" (84:8)?' He replied: 'O Aisha, that is merely the presentation. Whoever is scrutinized in the reckoning will be ruined.'
287.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, bukankah Allah berfirman: "Dia akan dihisab dengan hisab yang mudah" (84:8)?' Beliau menjawab: 'Wahai Aisyah, itu hanyalah pemaparan. Barang siapa yang diteliti dalam perhitungannya, maka ia akan celaka.'

288.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she mentioned a woman and imitated her as being short. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'You have backbitten her. I would not want to have imitated anyone even for such-and-such.'
288.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia menyebutkan seorang wanita dan menirukan gerakannya sebagai orang pendek. Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Engkau telah menggunjingnya. Aku tidak ingin meniru siapa pun meskipun mendapat imbalan begini dan begitu.'

289.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Gentleness never accompanies anything except that it beautifies it, and it is never removed from something except that it makes it ugly.'
289.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Kelembutan tidak pernah menyertai sesuatu melainkan ia memperindahnya, dan tidak pernah dicabut dari sesuatu melainkan ia membuatnya buruk.'

290.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked what the Prophet ﷺ used to do when he entered his home. She replied: 'He would help with the household chores. When the time for prayer arrived, he would go out and pray.'
290.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya apa yang biasa dilakukan Nabi ﷺ ketika masuk rumahnya. Ia menjawab: 'Beliau membantu pekerjaan rumah tangga. Ketika waktu shalat tiba, beliau keluar dan shalat.'

291.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ took my hand and pointed to the moon, saying: "O Aisha, seek refuge in Allah from the evil of this when it darkens — this is al-Ghasiq when it darkens."'
291.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ mengambil tanganku dan menunjuk ke bulan, bersabda: "Wahai Aisyah, berlindunglah kepada Allah dari kejahatan ini ketika ia gelap — inilah al-Ghasiq ketika ia gelap."'

292.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ kissed Uthman ibn Mazun when he was dead, and I could see tears flowing down his cheeks — meaning Uthman's cheeks.' Abd al-Rahman said: 'And his eyes were streaming, or he said: and he was weeping.'
292.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ mencium Utsman bin Mazh'un ketika ia telah wafat, dan aku dapat melihat air mata mengalir di pipinya — maksudnya pipi Utsman.' Abd al-Rahman berkata: 'Dan kedua matanya mengalir, atau ia berkata: dan beliau menangis.'

293.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that Hind bint Utbah came to the Prophet ﷺ and said: 'Abu Sufyan is a stingy man and does not give me and my child enough. May I take from his wealth without his knowledge?' He said: 'Take what is sufficient for you and your child, in a reasonable manner.'
293.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Hindun binti Utbah datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan berkata: 'Abu Sufyan adalah laki-laki yang pelit dan tidak memberikan nafkah yang cukup untukku dan anakku. Bolehkah aku mengambil dari hartanya tanpa sepengetahuannya?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ambillah apa yang cukup untuk kamu dan anakmu, dengan cara yang wajar.'

294.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to engage in intimate contact with me while I was menstruating — and he had the greatest control over his desires of all of you.'
294.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa bercumbu denganku sementara aku sedang haid — dan beliau adalah orang yang paling mampu menahan syahwatnya di antara kalian.'

295.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ never struck a servant, nor a woman, nor did he ever strike anything with his hand — except when striving in the cause of Allah.'
295.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ tidak pernah memukul seorang pembantu, tidak pula seorang wanita, dan tidak pernah memukul sesuatu pun dengan tangannya — kecuali ketika berjihad di jalan Allah.'

296.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ married me in Shawwal and consummated the marriage with me in Shawwal. Which of the wives of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was more favored in his eyes than me?' Aisha used to prefer that women enter into marriage in Shawwal.
296.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ menikahinya di bulan Syawal dan membina rumah tangga dengannya di bulan Syawal. Istri Rasulullah ﷺ mana yang lebih beruntung di sisinya daripada aku?' Aisyah biasa menyukai agar para wanita dinikahkan di bulan Syawal.

297.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Any condition that is not in the Book of Allah is null and void, even if there are a hundred such conditions.'
297.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Setiap syarat yang tidak terdapat dalam Kitab Allah adalah batal dan tidak berlaku, meskipun ada seratus syarat seperti itu.'

298.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'We said: O Messenger of Allah, shall we not build a shelter for you in Mina to shade you?' He said: 'No. Mina is a resting place for whoever arrives first.'
298.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kami berkata: Wahai Rasulullah, tidak bolehkah kami membangun tempat berlindung untukmu di Mina untuk menaungimu?' Beliau bersabda: 'Tidak. Mina adalah tempat persinggahan bagi siapa yang lebih dulu tiba.'

299.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) and Ibn Abbas that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ performed the Tawaf of the Ka'bah at night.
299.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) dan Ibnu Abbas bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melakukan tawaf Ka'bah pada malam hari.

300.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'Stopping at al-Muhassab is not a sunnah. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ stopped there only because it was easier for his departure.'
300.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Berhenti di al-Muhassab bukanlah sunnah. Rasulullah ﷺ berhenti di sana hanya karena itu lebih memudahkan keberangkatannya.'
